talents.title: The Talent System of Aethelgard
talents.subtitle: From Ignorant to Grandmaster – every talent is a path, every path a story.
talents.progression_intro: Talents are not unlocked by character level, but through practice, quests, and seeking out NPC masters. Only from level 5 (Apprentice) can a talent be used professionally.
talents.teachers_intro: Spread across all of Aethelgard are masters of their craft – some in busy cities, others in remote hideouts. They all have a story and a price.
talents.footer: © Aethelgard – A World on the Edge of the World-Fire
